_comment: Per-layer coverage baseline. CI gate fails if any layer drops >1pp below these numbers. Targets are the ADR-042 aspirational floors (not enforced — informational).

lib/api/.note: Ticket detail fetchTicket added — raised from 19.74% to 24.11% lines (2026-05-01)

lib/hooks/.note: AI-shell-C action proposal flow raised from 26.47% to 32.06% lines (2026-05-01)

lib/modules/.note: Schemas show 100% branches because they're declarations only

lib/utils/.note: csv.ts has no tests yet; cn() in lib/utils.ts is fully covered

lib/utils.ts.note: Smoke test added in R-OPS-01 T01 — this file is the only fully-covered surface

app/api/proxy/.note: ADR-042 target — currently no tests; tested implicitly by Playwright E2E

policy.comparison: current >= baseline - 1pp per layer; CI fails if any layer regresses
policy.baseline_update_rule: Baseline is updated when a story raises a layer's coverage by ≥5pp, OR when a deliberate ADR raises a floor
